title: Chubb Limited (CB)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Chubb using FY2025 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Compiled by Gemini 3.1.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-xfutcwc7>
Chubb grew revenue consistently (15.4% in 2023, 12.1% in 2024, 6.5% in 2025). But high premium growth eventually normalizes. A 4% cash flow growth rate acknowledges stable underwriting and modest ongoing yield improvements on their float without assuming unsustainable hard market conditions forever.
